visuals.title: String Memory Management
visuals.description: Visual diagram for String Memory Management
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">String Constructors and Operations</text>
  
  <!-- Constructor Section -->
  <rect x="50" y="50" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    String()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="50" y="100" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    new String()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Operations Section -->
  <rect x="250" y="50" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    .length
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="100" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    .concat()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    .slice()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    .toUpperCase()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from constructors to operations -->
  <path d="M170 70 L240 70" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Example string visualization -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="320" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Example: "Hello World"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- String character positions -->
  <text x="90" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    H
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    e
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="130" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    l
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="150" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    l
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="170" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    o
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="190" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    W
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="230" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    o
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    r
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="270" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    l
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="290" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    d
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Index indicators -->
  <text x="90" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    0
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="130" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="150" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="170" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="190" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    5
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    6
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="230" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    7
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="250" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    8
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="270" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    9
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="290" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    10
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.2s" begin="4.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
